# pi-swarm

Agent Swarm & Team orchestration extension for [pi-coding-agent](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi). Launch multiple subagents from a shared prompt template with live TUI progress, rate-limit-aware retries, and concurrency control. Also supports collaborative Agent Teams with role-based agents communicating via a shared mailbox.

**100% vibe-coded with deepseek-v4-pro** — zero human-written implementation code. Every line of TypeScript (4500+ LOC across 19 modules) was generated by AI. The design, architecture, concurrency model, and TUI rendering were ported from MoonshotAI/kimi-code and inspired by pi-crew.

## Credit

The AgentSwarm parallel architecture, SubagentBatch concurrency controller, swarm-mode state machine, and braille TUI progress component are ported directly from [MoonshotAI/kimi-code](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code). The team mailbox system and supervisor pattern are inspired by [pi-crew](https://github.com/baphuongna/pi-crew). Multi-agent design informed by research on LangGraph, CrewAI, OpenAI Swarm, and AutoGen.

Thank you to the kimi-code team for their excellent design, and to the pi-crew author for the mailbox architecture.

## Quick Start

### Install

```bash
# From npm (when published)
npm install pi-swarm

# From local source (development)
cd pi-swarm && npm install && npm run build
ln -sf "$(pwd)/dist" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-swarm
```

The extension is auto-discovered via `pi.extensions: ["./dist"]` in `package.json`.

### Verify Installation

```bash
# Start pi and check the extension loaded
pi -p "/swarm on" 2>&1 | grep -q "Extension error" && echo "FAIL" || echo "OK"
```

## Usage

### Mode 1: `/swarm` — Parallel Agents

Use when many subagents should run the **same task** on **different inputs**.

**Command**:
```bash
/swarm Review all TypeScript files in src/ for potential bugs
```

**What happens**: The LLM calls `AgentSwarm` with:
- A `prompt_template` containing the `{{item}}` placeholder
- An `items` array (one per file/subject)
- All agents run **in parallel** with independent `pi --print` child processes

**Manual control**:
```bash
/swarm on        # Enable persistent swarm mode (AgentSwarm auto-approved)
/swarm off       # Disable swarm mode
/swarm           # Toggle
```

**LLM call example**:
```
AgentSwarm({
  description: "Review TypeScript files for bugs",
  subagent_type: "coder",
  prompt_template: "Review {{item}} for bugs and report any issues found.",
  items: ["src/index.ts", "src/controller.ts", "src/tool.ts"]
})
```

**Resume failed work**:
```
AgentSwarm({
  description: "Retry failed reviews",
  resume_agent_ids: {
    "swarm-abc123": "continue",
    "swarm-def456": "continue"
  }
})
```

### Mode 2: `/swarm-team` — Collaborative Agents

Use when a complex task requires **multiple roles** working in **sequence** (e.g., explore → plan → code → review → test).

**Command**:
```bash
/swarm-team Implement user authentication with tests
```

**What happens**: A supervisor decomposes the goal into phases. Each phase runs a role-specific agent. Agents communicate via a **shared JSONL mailbox** — each agent receives context from previous phases.

**Default phases**:
```
explorer → planner → coder → reviewer → tester
```

**LLM call example**:
```
AgentTeam({
  goal: "Implement user authentication with JWT and tests",
  description: "Auth module implementation",
  max_agents: 3,
  roles: [
    { role: "coder", model: "deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro" }
  ]
})
```

## Output Format

### AgentSwarm Result (XML)

```xml
<agent_swarm_result>
<summary>completed: 3, failed: 1</summary>
<resume_hint>Call AgentSwarm with resume_agent_ids using the agent_id values
in this result to continue unfinished work.</resume_hint>
<subagent agent_id="swarm-abc" item="src/index.ts" outcome="completed">
No bugs found.
</subagent>
<subagent agent_id="swarm-def" item="src/missing.ts" outcome="failed">
File not found: src/missing.ts
</subagent>
</agent_swarm_result>
```

### AgentTeam Result (XML)

```xml
<agent_team_result>
<summary>Phases completed: 5/5. Succeeded: 4, Failed: 0, Skipped: 1.</summary>
<phase name="explore" role="explorer" outcome="completed">
Found auth module in src/auth/.
</phase>
<phase name="plan" role="planner" outcome="completed">
Plan: Create 2 files, modify 3 files.
</phase>
...
</agent_team_result>
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `PI_SWARM_MAX_CONCURRENCY` | unlimited | Hard cap on concurrent subagents during normal phase |
| `PI_SWARM_CREW_ROOT` | `.pi/swarm` | State directory for run manifests, task state, and mailbox |

## Architecture

```
src/
├── index.ts              # Entry: registers tools + commands + lifecycle hooks
├── shared/               # Shared infrastructure (zero pi/tui imports)
│   ├── types.ts          # Pure data type definitions
│   ├── pi-invoke.ts      # pi CLI invocation resolution
│   ├── spawner.ts        # Child process management (pi --print)
│   ├── controller.ts     # SubagentBatch concurrency controller
│   └── render.ts         # XML output formatter
├── swarm/                # Swarm mode — parallel, item-template
│   ├── tool.ts           # AgentSwarm tool (pi.registerTool)
│   ├── command.ts        # /swarm slash command
│   └── mode.ts           # SwarmMode lifecycle state machine
├── team/                 # Team mode — collaborative, mailbox-based
│   ├── tool.ts           # AgentTeam tool (pi.registerTool)
│   ├── command.ts        # /swarm-team slash command
│   ├── mailbox.ts        # JSONL inbox/outbox/delivery
│   ├── task-graph.ts     # Phase dependency graph (DAG)
│   └── supervisor.ts     # Team supervisor (decomposition + synthesis)
├── tui/                  # TUI components
│   ├── progress.ts       # Braille progress bar panel
│   ├── swarm-markers.ts  # Swarm mode state markers
│   └── permission-prompt.ts  # Permission dialog
└── state/                # Persistence layer
    ├── persistence.ts    # Atomic file writes + manifest/task/event I/O
    └── recovery.ts       # Crash detection + stale run cleanup
```

## Features

| Feature | Swarm | Team |
|---------|-------|------|
| LLM tool | `AgentSwarm` | `AgentTeam` |
| User command | `/swarm` | `/swarm-team` |
| Execution pattern | Parallel (all agents at once) | Sequential (phase-by-phase) |
| Agent communication | None (independent) | JSONL mailbox |
| Concurrency control | Ramp-up (5 + 1/700ms) + rate-limit phase | Single-agent per phase (controlled) |
| Context isolation | Fresh `pi --print` process per agent | Fresh `pi --print` process per agent |
| Model selection | Optional per-agent via settings | Optional per-role via config |
| Tool whitelist | All tools available | All tools available |
| Result format | `<agent_swarm_result>` XML | `<agent_team_result>` XML |
| Crash recovery | Auto-detect stale runs on session start | Auto-detect stale runs on session start |
| Max subagents | 128 | Unlimited (controlled by phases) |

## Concurrency Model

Ported from kimi-code's SubagentBatch with full fidelity:

**Normal Phase**:
- 5 agents launch immediately
- 1 additional agent every 700ms
- Capped by `PI_SWARM_MAX_CONCURRENCY` (unlimited by default)

**Rate-Limit Phase** (auto-triggered on HTTP 429):
- Capacity starts at ready normal launches (min 1)
- Each rate limit shrinks capacity by 1 (min 1), at most once per 2s
- 3-minute quiet window → capacity recovers by 1
- Rate-limited tasks retry with exponential backoff: 3s → 6s → 12s → doubling (max 120s)

## Development

```bash
npm install               # Install dependencies
npm run typecheck         # TypeScript validation (tsc --noEmit)
npm run build             # Compile to dist/
npm test                  # Run unit tests (34 tests)
npm run dev               # Watch mode (tsc --watch)
```

### Run Tests

```bash
npm test                  # All 34 tests
npx vitest run tests/swarm-tool.test.ts    # Single file
npx vitest run --reporter=verbose          # Verbose output
```

### Local Integration Test

```bash
# Build and symlink
npm run build
ln -sf "$(pwd)/dist" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/pi-swarm

# Smoke test (requires pi with configured model)
pi -p "/swarm on" 2>&1 | grep -q "Extension error" && echo "FAIL" || echo "OK"
```

## Vibe Coding

This project was **100% vibe-coded with deepseek-v4-pro**. No human wrote implementation code. The entire 4500+ line codebase across 19 TypeScript modules was generated through iterative AI prompting, with architecture decisions informed by reading kimi-code and pi-crew source code, and research on LangGraph/CrewAI/OpenAI Swarm/AutoGen.

The process:
1. Read kimi-code's AgentSwarm, SubagentBatch, and TUI components
2. Read pi-crew's mailbox system and supervisor pattern
3. Designed the dual-mode architecture (swarm + team)
4. Generated all modules iteratively, fixing type errors at each step
5. Wrote 34 unit tests covering controller, tool validation, rendering, and task graph
6. Verified with `tsc --noEmit` (zero errors) and `vitest run` (all passing)
